admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.heading: Keep di learning system healthy
admin.body: Check published content, drafts and platform readiness from one clear workspace.
admin.content_body: Admins fit manage every course, even published ones.
admin.guardrail_body: Use this side for platform oversight. Users, cohorts, revenue and analytics controls go land when their backend modules dey ready.
admin.portfolio_body: Courses, paths and cohorts for one place.

admin_earnings.title: Earnings
admin_earnings.heading: Platform earnings
admin_earnings.subtitle: Wetin the platform don collect from every order wey settle. Every order dey count on the terms wey dem sell am, so if you change setting e no go change history.
admin_earnings.take_help: The fee plus the platform own cut of revenue.
admin_earnings.fee_help: No refund — dem take am from top of every sale.
admin_earnings.instructors_help: Dem don credit am to the creators.
admin_earnings.escrowed_help: Na learners wey finish on time go collect am — no be platform money.
admin_earnings.refunded_help: Dem don return am to learners wey earn am.
admin_earnings.empty_body: Once paid content start to sell, the breakdown by course, path and cohort go show here.

admin_payouts.title: Payouts
admin_payouts.subtitle: Instructor payouts and learner Earn-Back refunds. Run bulk payout once accounts don verify.
admin_payouts.no_activity_hint: Instructors dey collect from guaranteed revenue and Earn-Back wey learner lose. Learner wey finish on time no lose anything, so that sale no go pay anything here — check Earn-Back refunds below.
admin_payouts.refunds_subtitle: Refunds for learners wey finish on time. We dey send am go their original payment method automatically.
admin_payouts.refund_retry_queued: We don send the refund again

admin_settings.methods_help: Which method learners fit use pay. If you off one, e go comot from checkout sharp-sharp — make you leave at least one on.
admin_settings.methods_last: Na only this payment method you get — on another one first.

methods_provider.paystack: Card, bank transfer and USSD. Na default for NGN, GHS, ZAR, KES.
methods_provider.stripe: Card and wallet. Na default for every other currency.

instructors.queue_hint: Dem no fit create or publish anything until you approve dem.
instructors.queue_empty: Nobody dey wait. New instructor applications go show here.

admin_users.title: Users
admin_users.subtitle: Everybody wey dey the platform. Change wetin dem fit do, or stop their access.
admin_users.suspend_desc: We go log dem out and refuse every request until you bring dem back. Their content, enrolments and any money wey we owe dem no go touch.
admin_users.reason_ph: e.g. E dey spam cohort chat everytime
admin_users.suspended_toast: We don suspend {{name}} and log dem out
admin_users.no_self_role: You no fit change your own role.
admin_users.copy_failed: We no fit copy am — copy am yourself

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle_instructor: How learners dey perform for your courses.
analytics.subtitle_admin: How learning dey go for di whole platform.
analytics.table_empty: Nothing yet — analytics go show once learners join.
analytics.learners_error: We no fit load di learners.
analytics.unknown_type: We no sabi dis content type.
analytics.no_lessons: Dis course never get lessons yet.

assessment.settings_subtitle: Pass mark, time, retakes and di integrity rules wey learner go take am under.
assessment.title: Title
assessment.ac_fullscreen_hint: E go auto-submit if dem comot plenty times.
assessment.ac_camera_hint: Face check every 30s — e dey run for browser.
assessment.questions_hint: Add questions by hand, or make AI draft am from lesson.
assessment.no_questions: No question dey yet. Add one or generate from lesson.
assessment.delete_desc: Dis go comot di assessment and all im questions.
assessment.code_grading_ai_hint: Dem go grade am automatic against your reference solution wen di learner submit.
assessment.code_grading_manual_hint: You go check each submission and grade am yourself. Di attempt go hold until you do.
assessment.code_notes_ph: Optional notes to guide your own grading later.
assessment.code_reference: Reference solution / wetin e suppose do
assessment.code_reference_ph: Talk wetin correct code suppose do, or paste model solution. Di AI go grade di learner code against am.
assessment.ai_blurb: AI go draft questions from the transcript of every lesson wey you pick — choose whole module or course make e spread the questions. Check am and edit before learners take the assessment.
assessment.ai_no_lessons: No source lesson dey for dis assessment. Add questions by hand instead.
assessment.ai_need_transcript: None of dis lessons get transcript yet — add one make you fit generate from am.
assessment.final_subtitle: Learner must pass dis one to finish di course and trigger Earn-Back.
assessment.retry_policy_hint: Wetin go happen if learner no pass: how many try dem get, how long dem go wait between try, and whether dem try go reset after break.
assessment.lockout_hint: Blank = try no go ever reset
assessment.settings_subtitle_formative: Pass mark, timing and the integrity rules for this one. Na practice — retakes no get limit; na only final assessment dey limit attempts.

blog.title: Blog
blog.heading: Blog
blog.subtitle: Write articles wey go show for di public blog — learning science, product news and more.
blog.empty: No post yet — write your first article.
blog.author: Author
blog.excerpt_ph: One or two sentence wey go show for card.

charts.enrolments_subtitle: New enrolments wey enter your content every day (UTC).
charts.earnings_subtitle: We book am when the money don become your own: guaranteed cut when dem pay, forfeited Earn-Back when e resolve (UTC months).
charts.funnel_subtitle: Out of everybody wey enrol, who start — and who finish.
charts.funnel_empty: Nobody don enrol yet — the funnel dey start with one.
charts.revenue_subtitle: Orders wey don settle, by the month wey dem pay (UTC). The stack height na gross; Earn-Back escrow na learners' money, e no dey here.
charts.ac_subtitle: Attempts wey dem submit and wetin anti-cheat see.
charts.ac_clean: No anti-cheat event for this window. Quiet na good thing.
charts.outcomes_subtitle: Everybody wey enrol for your content, by where dem dey.
charts.earnback_subtitle: Earn-Back sales wey don resolve. On time mean say the learner win — na the deal dey work be that.
charts.earnback_empty: No Earn-Back sale don resolve yet.
charts.revenue_by_type_subtitle: Gross revenue wey settle, by wetin dem buy.
charts.growth_subtitle: Total learners wey register over time (UTC months).
charts.top_content_subtitle: Your content wey get the most enrolments, all time.
charts.top_content_empty: Publish something make e race go top.
charts.heatmap_subtitle: Learning activity by day and hour (UTC).
charts.heatmap_empty: No learning activity for this window yet.

cohorts.title: Cohorts
cohorts.heading: Cohorts
cohorts.subtitle: Schedule guided run of courses with start date, seats, groups and assigned staff.
cohorts.empty: No cohort yet — schedule your first run.
cohorts.no_courses: No courses yet — add one below.
cohorts.paths_hint: Add whole paths join the standalone courses.
cohorts.no_paths: No path yet — add one below.

courses.title: My courses
courses.subtitle: Create, publish and maintain lessons wey help learners focus.
courses.heading: Build courses learners fit finish
courses.admin_heading: Manage every course for di platform
courses.admin_subtitle: Review, open, publish and delete instructor courses without leaving admin studio.
courses.empty: You never create any course yet.
courses.delete_description: This one go delete "{{title}}" forever, with all modules and lessons. Published courses fit delete too.

earnback_deadline.title: Set your Earn-Back deadline
earnback_deadline.body: Finish before the date wey you pick and your Earn-Back go return to your card. Na you go choose — up to {{max}} days.
earnback_deadline.body_amount: Finish before the date wey you pick and we go send {{amount}} back to your card. Na you go choose — up to {{max}} days.
earnback_deadline.legend: Choose how many days you need
earnback_deadline.final_note: Na final — you no fit change am later. If you finish late, dem go deduct 2% of your Earn-Back every day.

earnback_status.deadline_yours: Your deadline: {{date}} — na you set am, e final.
earnback_status.deadline_creator: Deadline: {{date}} — na the creator set am.
earnback_status.refunded_body: We dey return {{amount}} go your original payment method.
earnback_status.refunded_eta: Refund dey normally land within 5–10 business days, e depend on your bank. You no need do anything else.
earnback_status.sending_body: You earn {{amount}} back. We dey send am go your original payment method now — this page go update by itself.
earnback_status.failed_body: Your {{amount}} no lost — our team dey work on am and go reach you. You no need do anything.
earnback_status.none_body: No Earn-Back remain for this one.
earnback_status.escrow_body_nodate: Finish everything make you collect your Earn-Back.
earnback_status.escrow_overdue: Your deadline don pass — finish quick; small money dey comot every day now.
earnback_status.escrow_body: Finish within {{count}} days make you collect full refund for your payment method.

earnings.empty_body: Na the cash wey we don transfer give you be this. Sales wey no pay you anything — because the learner finish on time — dey your Earn-Back ledger below.
earnings.lifetime: Total money wey you don earn
earnings.title: Earnings
earnings.subtitle: Your payouts from paid enrolments. You dey keep 90% of every sale wey settle as revenue.
earnings.no_accounts: Add the bank account wey you want make we send your money to. Until one verify, your payouts go just dey wait safe as pending.
earnings.account_error: We no fit verify that account

editor.no_modules: Add your first module make you start.
editor.builder_body: Arrange di course into short modules and make sure every lesson get content plus transcript.
editor.reason_video_not_encoded: Upload di video and let encoding finish.

feature_requests.title: Feature requests
feature_requests.body: Instructors wey wan show for homepage carousel.

grade.title: Grade submission
grade.code_queue_hint: Dis learners submit code wey you choose to grade by hand. Dem result go hold until you grade am.
grade.load_failed_body: Refresh di page or go back and try again.
grade.queue_load_failed_body: Refresh di page or go back and try again.
grade.not_yours: Na only the person wey create this project fit grade am.

grouping.title: Groups
grouping.mode_skill_based_hint: Auto-grouping dey mix skill levels well-well.
grouping.mode_balanced_hint: Auto-grouping dey balance level and when dem join.
grouping.mode_manual_hint: Drag learners put for groups, or use the Move button.
grouping.regen_desc: Dis go rebuild every group from di cohort grouping mode. Learners wey dia group change go get notification.
grouping.drop_here: Drop learners for here, or use Move
grouping.no_other_groups: No other group yet — create one first.
grouping.delete_group_desc: Im members go go back to di unassigned pool.
grouping.banner_no_learners: No learner never enroll for dis cohort yet.
grouping.banner_assign: Select learners for down make you form group, or drag one put inside group. For mobile, tap Move.
grouping.banner_done: Every learner don dey group. Use Move to shuffle anybody.

hub.title: Course
hub.locked_lessons: Finish all {{total}} lessons make e open. Na {{done}} you don do.
hub.locked_quizzes: Pass every module quiz make e open.
hub.locked_courses_one: Finish {{count}} more course make e open.
hub.locked_courses_other: Finish {{count}} more courses make e open.
hub.locked_paths_one: Finish {{count}} more path make e open.
hub.locked_paths_other: Finish {{count}} more paths make e open.
hub.locked_path_courses_one: Finish {{count}} more course for this path make e open.
hub.locked_path_courses_other: Finish {{count}} more courses for this path make e open.

instructor.title: Instructor studio
instructor.body: Track your courses and paths, and jump back to dey build.
instructor.empty: Create your first course make you start.

intro.title: Intro / preview
intro.subtitle: Optional video, audio, PDF or text wey learners go see before dem enroll — your own preview.
intro.needs_media: Add media for the editor make e complete

ledger.title: Earn-Back ledger
ledger.subtitle: Every sale of your content and wetin happen to am. The payouts for up dey show only money wey actually move.
ledger.empty_body: Once person buy your paid content, the sale go show here — including sales wey no pay you anything because the learner finish on time.
ledger.at_stake_hint: Na only if dem miss deadline
ledger.on_time_headline: {{count}} out of {{total}} learners finish on time. Dem collect their money back — na your Earn-Back dey work be that.
ledger.why_at_stake: You go earn {{amount}} extra only if dem miss {{date}}.
ledger.why_at_stake_nodate: You go earn {{amount}} extra only if dem no finish.
ledger.why_on_time: Dem finish on time and collect their money back — na the {{pct}}% wey you set.
ledger.why_late: Dem finish {{count}} days late, so that part of the Earn-Back come to you.
ledger.why_missed: Dem never finish at all, so the whole Earn-Back come to you.
ledger.why_settled: No Earn-Back for this one — we pay you at checkout.

lesson.title: Edit lesson
lesson.processing: E dey process — encoding for background
lesson.load_failed_body: Refresh di page or go back to di course and try again.
lesson.upload_queued: Upload don finish. Encoding don start.
lesson.audio_encoding_body: We dey balance di sound and prepare di protected audio file.
lesson.encoding_failed_body: Encoding fail. Replace di file try again.
lesson.transcript_hint: You need am before you fit publish (accessibility + search)
lesson.transcript_placeholder: Paste or type di full transcript…
lesson.drop_or_browse: Drag file come here, or browse
lesson.quiz_hint: Set how dis lesson go complete.
lesson.pre_quiz_hint: Optional recall check before the lesson.
lesson.post_quiz_hint: You must pass am to complete the lesson.
lesson.transcript_required_warn: Add transcript — you no fit publish the course until every lesson get one (§4.2).
lesson.free_preview_hint: Anybody fit watch/read dis lesson before dem enroll.
lesson.timed_hint: Paste or upload .vtt / .srt file make the transcript dey highlight as the lesson dey play. E no go change captions.
lesson.timed_parse_error: No timed segment dey. Paste correct .vtt or .srt transcript.
lesson.code_editor_only_hint: Na only JavaScript dey run for browser now; other languages na editor only.
lesson.code_instructions_ph: Talk wetin di learner suppose do…

paths.title: Learning Paths
paths.heading: Learning Paths
paths.subtitle: Join your courses into one ordered journey wey get im own price and Earn-Back.
paths.delete_description: “{{title}}” go comot. Im courses no go delete.
paths.empty: No path yet — create your first one.
paths.settings_subtitle: Thumbnail, outcome, price and Earn-Back wey people go see for catalogue.
paths.outcome_ph: By di end, learners go fit…
paths.earnback_hint: Di % govern di whole path purchase, e overshadow di courses inside.
paths.courses_subtitle: Order matter — learners dey move from top to bottom.
paths.draft_courses_note: Some courses still dey draft — publish dem make learners fit start.
paths.or_create_course: You no see am? Create new draft course:
paths.or_create_path: You no see am? Create new draft path:
paths.estimated_duration_ph: like 6–8 weeks (your own pace or with facilitator)
paths.load_failed_body: Refresh di page or go back and try again.

peer.intro: Review your peers' work well well. You must finish {{n}} make di project complete.
peer.none: No peer submission dey to review yet — check back soon.

play.auto_complete_done: You don complete am — well done!
play.read_to_complete: Read reach the end make you complete dis lesson.
play.completes_at: You go need to watch reach {{pct}}% before you fit complete am.
play.prequiz_body: Small recall quiz before you start.
play.on_to_next: Make we go the next lesson.
play.course_done_hint: You don reach the end of the course.
play.quiz_locked: Finish the lesson content first before dis quiz go open.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Na your public face for every course, path and cohort wey you create.
profile.name: Name
profile.photo_hint: Tap your photo to change or remove am. PNG, JPG or WebP, up to 5 MB.
profile.expertise_ph: Type a skill and press Enter, or pick from below…
profile.notifications_hint: How we go reach you about payouts, work wey you go grade, and Earn-Back.
profile.whatsapp_optin_hint: Payout and earnings alerts for WhatsApp — we no dey spam.
profile.whatsapp_needs_phone: Add phone number for up make WhatsApp alerts work.

project.delete_desc: Dis go comot di project and all di submissions.
project.title: Title
project.description_ph: Wetin learners suppose build and submit?
project.code_language_hint: Di language wey learners go write. Na only JavaScript dey run for di browser self-check; di others na editor-only.
project.file_types: Type wey dem allow (use comma separate am)
project.peer_count: How many peer review per submission
project.no_rubric: No rubric yet — add criteria wey you go take grade (e optional).
project.section_subtitle: Things wey learners go submit and you go grade.
project.retry_policy_hint: Wetin go happen if submission no pass: how many attempt learner get, how long dem go wait after dem fail, and whether dem attempt go reset after break.
project.retry_lockout_hint: Blank = attempts no go ever reset

report.title: Integrity report
report.is_invalidated: Dem invalidate am — learner must retake
report.admin_clean: No flagged attempt dey for di platform.
report.unmonitored_note: Camera monitoring no start, so nobody watch this attempt at all. E no mean say the person cheat — e no mean say dem clean either. Judge am on top wetin dey ground.

retry.locked_title: You don use all your attempts
retry.locked_body: Your attempts go reset on {{date}} — go read the material and come back strong.
retry.none_left_body: You don use every attempt for this one. Talk to your instructor if you think say na mistake.

settings.name: Name
settings.name_hint: Di title wey learners go see for di catalogue.
settings.name_too_short: Di name must be at least 3 characters.
settings.title: Course settings
settings.subtitle: Thumbnail, description, price and Earn-Back wey people go see for catalogue.
settings.description_ph: Wetin learners go fit do after dis course?
settings.earnback_hint: Make learners fit earn part of di price back if dem finish on time.
settings.earnback_preview: Learners fit earn back reach {{amount}} — {{pct}}% of {{remainder}} (the price minus the {{fee}}% platform fee).
settings.estimated_duration_ph: like 6–8 weeks (your own pace or with facilitator)
settings.estimated_duration_hint: Estimate wey learners go see, like weeks. The content length dey calculate by itself from the lessons.
settings.content_length_hint: Dem calculate am from lesson video & audio.
settings.content_length_hint_path: Dem calculate am from the courses for dis path.
settings.featured_hint: E go show for the Featured carousel for homepage.
settings.request_featuring_hint: Ask admin make e feature dis for homepage.
settings.feature_requested_note: The instructor don request featuring — approve am for up.
settings.earnback_days_hint: Days from payment. For cohort, na you go set am — no be learners.
settings.earnback_creator_all: You go earn {{zero}} if learner finish on time — for 100%, na only learners wey miss dem deadline go pay you. Reduce the percentage make you get guaranteed share for every sale.
settings.earnback_creator: You dey keep {{amount}} for every sale when e settle — {{share}}% of the {{guaranteed}} wey no be refund.

studio.instructors_only_body: This studio na for approved instructors and admins.
studio.admin_only_body: This side na for platform admins.

submit.rubric: How dem go take grade you
submit.pending: You don submit — dem never grade am.
submit.code_hint: Run na self-check — na reviewer go grade you, no be di run.
submit.peer_cta: Do {{n}} peer review(s) make you fit finish dis project.
submit.locked_body: Finish all the lessons and module quiz for this course before you send your project.
submit.offline: E be like say you dey offline. Your draft dey saved for this device — try again once you connect.

take.reason_passed: You don already pass dis assessment.
take.reason_cooldown: Abeg wait small before you retake.
take.integrity_notice: Dem dey monitor dis assessment. Di timer dey run for server and dem go grade your answer automatically.
take.code_hint: Run na self-check — dem go decide your grade after you submit.
take.auto_submitted: dem submit am automatically (time don finish)
take.tab_warning: Dem dey record am as you comot for di page ({{count}}/{{limit}}).
take.tab_autosubmit: You don change tab too much — dem dey submit your attempt.
take.camera_denied: You must allow camera before you fit start dis assessment.
take.reason_locked_out: You don use all your retakes for now.
take.reason_prerequisites: Finish all the lessons and module quiz first.
take.reason_awaiting_grading: Your last attempt dey wait make instructor grade am.
take.awaiting_body: You don submit dis assessment. Instructor go grade your code — your result go show here wen dem finish.
take.camera_unavailable_hint: We go record your attempt as one wey we no watch.
take.offline_banner: You dey offline — continue dey go. Your answers dey saved for this device and dem go sync when you come back. The timer still dey run.
take.offline_submit: E be like say you dey offline. Your answers dey safe for this device — we go submit once you come back.

teaching.title: Cohorts wey you dey teach
teaching.subtitle: Cohorts wey admin assign you to teach. You get read-only view to monitor and help learners — group management na for facilitators, settings na for admins.
teaching.empty_title: No cohort assign to you yet
teaching.empty_body: Wen admin assign cohort make you teach, e go show here.
